title: Bridge Essay: Positive psychological states in the arc from mindfulness to self-transcendence:

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** From mindfulness to self-transcendence — positive psychological states as bridge between contemplative practice and transcendent experience

**Positive psychological states in the arc from mindfulness to self-transcendence: extensions of the Mindfulness-to-Meaning Theory and applications to addiction and chronic pain treatment.**. Current opinion in psychology. (2019). PMID: 30763873. DOI: 10.1016/j.copsyc.2019.01.004. The Mindfulness-to-Meaning Theory (MMT) is atemporally dynamic process model of mindful positive emotion regulation that elucidates downstream cognitive-affective mechanisms by which mindfulness promotes health and resilience. Here we review and extend the MMT to explicate how mindfulness fosters self-transcendence by evoking upward spirals of decentering, attentional broadening, reappraisal, and savoring.
